titleStmt.title: SII 30.167: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 167. (A.R. No. 246 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 30: 1042 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription probably belongs to Rājēndra Chōḻa I. Hence it is engraved in continuation of the above record (ARE-1915, No. 245). It seems to record the purchase of 3000 kuḻi of land as tax-free by the Śivabrāhmaṇas from Āḷakhāṉa kramavittan for providing food offerings to the god Sri Pōndaiyuḍaiya-mahādēva at Parākramasōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in [Dāmark]-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattut tāmarkkoṭṭattu parākkiramacoḻa caturvetimaṅkalattu śrīpontai yuṭaiya mahādevar koyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiy
kaḻaṉicivaṉum cikaṭampaṭṭaṉum bhāradvājiyum tikaikkūttaṉum Akkāḷipaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa civappirāmaṇarom Ivvūriyāḷuṅ kaṇattār Eḻarai vicattu Āḷakkāṉakkiramavittaṉ pakkal vi
lil Uccam potu coki muṭṭāmai caṉtirātittavaṟkum maṭṭakkaṭavomākavum I[ ddravyaṅ] koṇṭu Itukku van=ta policaiyāl Arumoḻitevaṉ marakkālāl kuṟuṇi nellāka koṇṭu mila
Ilaikkaṟiyum ney khaceviṭum mor nāḻiyum veṟuṅkāy Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai nālum Ipparicu cantirātittavaṟ mānom
Uṭaiyār cikoyil ṉāḻikai Uṭaiya civapirāmaṇan kācipan parākkiramacoḻa paṭṭaneṉum kācipan tiruppontaipaṭṭaṉum parākkiramaṉ Akatta
Eḻum Ipparicu koṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ celuttak kaṭavomākavum Ikkoyilil munpu niṉṟu cevvomai śrīmāye
ccurarom Ikkoyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻi
Digital edition of SII 30.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
